Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Written Responses To Special Interrogatories, And For Sanctions Against Defts Financial Interactive, Inc. And John Kiley And Their Counsel Thomas K. Hammitt
Off Calendar Feb-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. SUSAN Q. KAIRA APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KAREN G. LEVY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - Plaintiff Forte Capital Partners, LLC's Motion To Compel Further Written Responses To Special Interrogatories is granted. The responses to Interrogatory Nos. 2, 3, 4, and 6 are wholly inadequate. General objections and general responses are ordered stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. The court finds the responses and the opposition were made without substantial justification. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $1,625, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
